title: [PrepareForEmission] Temporaries are not spilled in a procedural region

features.name: sv_initial procedural block with complex combinational expression
features.description: Code should include an sv.initial procedural block containing a complex combinational expression using comb.or with many operands
features.snippet:
sv.initial {
  %state_read = sv.read_inout %state : !hw.inout<i2>
  %read = comb.extract %state_read from 0 : (i2) -> i1
  %lhs = comb.or %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read : i1
  %rhs = comb.or %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read : i1
  %out = comb.concat %lhs, %rhs : i1, i1
  sv.passign %state, %out : i2
}

features.name: sv.reg used in sv.initial with multiple reads
features.description: Code should include an sv.reg that is read multiple times within an sv.initial procedural block

features.name: comb.concat used in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a comb.concat operation whose result is used in an sv.passign within a procedural region

features.name: temporal variable requiring spilling in procedural region
features.description: Code should include a pattern where multiple comb.or operations feed into comb.concat and then sv.passign, requiring temporaries to be spilled for correct Verilog emission
features.snippet:
%lhs = comb.or %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read : i1
%rhs = comb.or %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read, %read : i1
%out = comb.concat %lhs, %rhs : i1, i1
sv.passign %state, %out : i2
